entry.title: Higgsfield AI Ships Explainer to Turn Any Topic Into a 10-Minute Documentary
entry.summary: Higgsfield's new Explainer Skill uses Claude Fable 5 and Gemini Omni Flash to auto-research, narrate, and render up to 10-minute faceless documentary videos from a single prompt.

entry.title: Epoch's EBR-Bench Shows GPT-5.5 and Claude Can't Learn From Practice
entry.summary: Epoch AI's EBR-bench puts frontier models through 30 rounds of a complex board game -- and finds zero evidence they learn from experience

entry.title: GitHub Copilot Adds Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7, Its First Open-Weight Model
entry.summary: Kimi K2.7 Code becomes the first open-weight model selectable in Copilot's model picker, offering a lower-cost option for agentic coding workflows.

entry.title: Browser Use CLI 3.0 Cuts Agent Token Usage 6x With Direct Chrome Access
entry.summary: Browser Use CLI 3.0 gives coding agents like Claude Code direct CDP browser control with 6x fewer tokens than alternatives

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Science Hackathon Offers Researchers $100K to Reinvent Biomedicine
entry.summary: Anthropic and Gladstone Institutes launch a week-long virtual hackathon to push Claude Science into biomedical research, with $100K in credits on the line.

entry.title: Tufa Labs Wins $25K Beating Frontier AI on the World's Hardest Benchmark
entry.summary: ARC Prize awards its first Milestone #1 prizes for ARC-AGI-3, with Tufa Labs, Reki, and Md Boktiar Mahbub Murad open-sourcing the top-scoring agents on the world's hardest agentic benchmark.

entry.title: Sakana's Fugu Ultra Beats GPT-5.5 and Claude by Orchestrating Both
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Fugu lands in OpenCode, the same tool used to build it â a multi-agent orchestration system that beats frontier models by coordinating them

entry.title: GitHub Copilot's Smarter Code Review Cuts Costs 20% While Catching Subtle Bugs
entry.summary: GitHub Copilot code review now routes complex PRs to a higher-reasoning model, giving teams a configurable depth dial for security-sensitive and cross-service changes.

entry.title: Reve AI's Reve 2.0 Hits #2 on Image Leaderboard Using 10x Fewer GPUs
entry.summary: Reve 2.0 debuts at #2 on the Artificial Analysis Image Arena, introducing a layout-first architecture that makes generated images editable like code

entry.title: Google Kills MusicFX to Go All-In on Flow Music
entry.summary: Google shuts down MusicFX and MusicFX DJ on July 31, consolidating its AI music experiments into the more capable Google Flow Music platform.

entry.title: Vercel Brings Claude Fable 5 Back to v0 After US Export Ban
entry.summary: Vercel's v0 AI app builder re-enables Claude Fable 5 as a selectable model after a brief US government-ordered suspension

entry.title: Manus Targets Small Businesses With Shopify and HubSpot Connectors Amid $1B Chaos
entry.summary: Manus launches a small business toolkit with 20+ connectors, free webinars, and a use-case competition â all while navigating a blocked $2B Meta acquisition
